/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bugbox.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bugbox.dir/src_cpp/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox.dir/src_cpp/dna.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox.dir/src_cpp/nn/nn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox.dir/src_cpp/creature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox.dir/src_cpp/population.cpp.o -o bugbox  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so _deps/raylib-build/raylib/external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
